question: Is the image a realistic photograph of a chemistry laboratory benchtop?
Is the viewpoint frontal and from a slightly low angle?
Does the background show a light gray wall and a closed glass window with no visible scenery behind it?
Is there a white lab bench in the center with circular water stains and fine scratches on the surface?
Is there a glass beaker positioned in the center of the frame?
Does the central glass beaker contain a light blue solution with a curved meniscus?
Is a white magnetic stir bar visible resting at the bottom of the central beaker?
Is there a glass Erlenmeyer flask positioned to the left of the central beaker?
Does the Erlenmeyer flask contain a pale yellow solution?
Is the Erlenmeyer flask tightly stoppered with a white rubber stopper?
Is there a disposable pipette lying flat in front of the Erlenmeyer flask?
Does the tip of the pipette point toward the lower right of the frame?
Is there an iron stand assembly in the back left with a black square base?
Is a burette clamped vertically downward on the iron stand?
Is the burette filled with pale purple liquid?
Is there an unlabeled transparent beaker positioned below the burette?
Is there an unmarked graduated cylinder standing upright in the front left of the frame?
Does the graduated cylinder contain bright green solution?
Is there a white wash bottle on the left side with its nozzle pointing toward the right?
Is there a test tube rack positioned on the right side of the frame?
Are there exactly seven test tubes inserted at equal intervals in the rack?
Do exactly two of the test tubes contain light pink liquid?
Are there transparent safety goggles placed upside down in the front right area?
Are there light blue disposable gloves beside the goggles with fingers pointing toward the left?
Is there a magnetic hotplate stirrer in the back right with a pure black panel and power off?
Are there exactly two petri dishes on the hotplate?
Does one petri dish contain a transparent gel and the other a matte black gel?
Is there a transparent waste container at the far right with a blank white label?
Is the waste container approximately half full?
